entities.name: Vrijen
entities.context: Author of the outreach template, signs emails as vrijen@careerspan.com

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company, referenced in email signature

entities.name: Crisp Articulation Checklist
entities.context: Framework for generating focused outreach messages with 4 key questions

entities.name: Thrust
entities.context: Classification of outreach intent: Sales/Partnership, Info-seeking, or Network access

entities.name: Value Proposition
entities.context: Core element of outreach - what V specifically offers or seeks

entities.name: CTA
entities.context: Call to action based on thrust type - partnership exploration, conversation request, or network access ask

entities.name: Connector
entities.context: Intermediary person who receives the outreach email (not the target)

relationships.context: Thrust classification is step 2 of the checklist
Value proposition is step 4 of the checklist
CTA content is determined by thrust type
Rule 1 states outreach should address the connector, not target
